name: augnes-codex
description: Packages the Augnes Codex Skill for guided setup and reuse onboarding with Augnes memory/reuse/context in Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Guide Augnes setup, /hooks trust, and memory reuse fallback in Codex.
interface.longDescription: Packages the Augnes Codex Skill v0.1 for guided setup and reuse onboarding. Guides Codex through installer dry-run, explicit --yes install, /hooks trust review, and memory-reuse fallback. Hook trust remains manual; installing this plugin does not mutate ~/.codex, bundle hooks, or add MCP, provider/model, storage, persistence, Codex SDK, GitHub mutation, or automatic memory item creation behavior.
